717 GG0130G1_LWR_DRSNG_STRT_CD GG0130G1_LWR_DRSNG_STRT_CD GG0130G1 Lower Dressing Start Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to dress and undress below the waist; including fasteners, if applicable (excluding footwear) at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching
